hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"New session started. Before doing anything else, run /obs-guide to brief on what is complete, incomplete, and what to start next, based on the Obsidian vault."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Context is about to be compacted. Before continuing, run /obs-retain-context now to snapshot in-flight work, decisions, files touched, and open threads into the vault, so detail is not lost to compaction."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUseFailure","additionalContext":"A tool call just failed. Once this is understood and fixed, log the error and its fix via /obs-mistakes so it is never repeated. If there is a broader reusable lesson beyond just this bug, also log it via /obs-learn."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A file was just written under the Obsidian vault. Per the linking protocol, check whether the new note links, in its Related section, to a note from a different obs-star kind or section than this one. If so, consider running /obs-connect on that pair now instead of leaving it as just a wikilink."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A file was just edited under the Obsidian vault. Per the linking protocol, check whether the note links, in its Related section, to a note from a different obs-star kind or section than this one. If so, consider running /obs-connect on that pair now instead of leaving it as just a wikilink."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionEnd","additionalContext":"A session is ending. Run /obs-closeday now to log progress, new ideas, and unfinished carryover, and run /obs-requests to research this sessions ambiguous prompts and file refined versions before it closes."}}'
